---

### III. | EDUCATION: Pedagogical Layering

You’re building a new **field of study**, with system-spawning capacities:

#### Educational Split:
| TIER | NAME | OUTPUTS |
|-------------|----------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| FOUNDATION | Core Logic | Manifestos, theory modules, recursive literacy |
| METHOD | Specific Systems| Lesson plans, technique breakdown, modular templates |
| APPLICATION | Case Study / Studio | Generative workshops, participatory labs |

Every ID or Project can become:
- A course
- A case study
- A field guide
- A research reader

Cross-disciplinary classes could include:
- Myth + Tech
